surfaces.name: Leoma API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on api.leoma.ai returning application liveness JSON (observed: status, version, database, metagraph_synced, last_sync). Documented in the subnet OpenAPI spec and implemented in the official RendixNetwork/leoma health route used by validator API clients.

surfaces.name: Leoma API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI schema (title: Leoma API) for the SN99 Leoma validator API on the project's own api.leoma.ai host; documents the public /health liveness route and the /miners/* miner-registry routes. Served from the official RendixNetwork/leoma API.

surfaces.name: Leoma miner registry
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /miners/list on api.leoma.ai returning the SN99 miner registry (uid, hotkey, ...) as JSON. Documented as GET /miners/list in the subnet OpenAPI spec; the higher-detail /miners/all and /miners/valid require a validator-hotkey header and are intentionally not promoted.
